message:
fix(test): update extension UI select assertion to match provenance format

The format_extension_ui_prompt function was updated to include [provenance]
prefix (e.g. "[unknown] select: Pick one") instead of the old format
("Extension select: Pick one"). Update the tui_state test assertion to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
